name: Mui
greetingText: Calling your name fills my heart with immense happiness!
wishText: May this love always be with you ;)
textInChatBox: Happy birthday to you!! woof woof woof woof !
text2: That's what I was going to do.
text3: But i think it's far from enough .
replayText: Tap the screen if you want to watch it again.
